title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Runtime Trace: Truthiness Guards
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js truthiness guards increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use truthiness only when every falsy value shares the same domain meaning and otherwise write explicit guards.
Predict expression grouping, short-circuit evaluation, assignment, optional chaining, and nullish coalescing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
